name: Emily Chen
bio: Roommate from university days. We bonded over late-night study sessions and weekend hikes in the mountains.

name: Marcus Okoro
bio: Former colleague from the marketing team. We still play pickup basketball every month and talk business ideas.

name: Sophia Patel
bio: Grew up on the same street. Our families still celebrate Diwali together every year.

name: Liam Dubois
bio: Met during a backpacking trip through Europe in 2022. We share a love for street photography and hidden cafes.

name: Aisha Khan
bio: Yoga studio buddy who became one of my closest friends. We motivate each other through career changes and life ups and downs.

name: Diego Morales
bio: High school bandmate. Still plays guitar in a local band and we always talk about starting a side project together.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Collaborated on several freelance design projects. Great taste in minimalist interiors and we swap book recommendations.

name: Jamal Wright
bio: Gym partner from the local community center. We push each other during workouts and talk about fatherhood and life goals.

name: Noah Williams
bio: Met at a startup event. We often discuss business ideas and emerging tech trends over coffee.

name: Fatima Rahman
bio: Classmate from university. We still keep in touch and help each other with career planning and studies.
